name: harness-kit
description: Reusable Codex workflow harness with docs templates, spec-first and issue-first execution rules, decision records, review notes, troubleshooting capture, technical learning notes, and sub-agent playbooks.

interface.shortDescription: Reusable Codex docs harness with spec, planning, issue, review, troubleshooting, and learning workflows.
interface.longDescription: A reusable Codex plugin for bootstrapping project docs, clarifying scope with lightweight specs, tracking implementation through issue docs, capturing decisions and incidents, writing review and learning notes, and using sub-agents in a disciplined way.
defaultPrompt: Bootstrap this repository with the harness docs templates.
Write a short spec and implementation plan for this repository change.
Set up an issue-driven implementation workflow for this repo.
Capture the review, troubleshooting, and learning notes for this implementation.
